name: remotelink-monorepo
description: RemoteLink Monorepo — Cross-platform remote desktop and screen sharing

scripts.build: npm install --prefix web && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix web" "npm run dev --prefix desktop"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix web && npm install --prefix desktop && npm install --prefix mobile
